title: Trondheim, Trøndelag — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Trondheim, Trøndelag: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Trondheim is a city in Trøndelag with a population of 205,000. Norway’s historic capital and home to Nidaros Cathedral, a vibrant student city with cutting-edge technology.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
